title: Terminal session management tools for collab sessions
purpose: Provides functions to create, list, kill, rename, and reorder terminal sessions within collaborative development environments.
module_context: Exports multiple terminal session management functions and tool schemas for MCP registration. Includes input validation and integration with terminal manager service for tmux session handling.

methods.name: terminalCreateSession
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, name?: string): Promise<CreateSessionResult>

steps.content: Validate that project and session parameters are non-empty strings.
Read the current sessions state from storage.
Determine an appropriate display name for the new session.
Generate a unique tmux session name for the new session.
Create a new tmux session in the project directory.
Construct a new session record with generated ID and metadata.
Add the new session to the sessions array.
Write the updated sessions state back to storage.
Return the result containing session ID and connection details.
Validate that project and session parameters are non-empty strings.
Read the current sessions state from storage.
Sort the sessions by their order field in ascending order.
Return the sorted list of sessions.

methods.name: terminalKillSession
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<KillSessionResult>

steps.content: Validate that project, session, and id parameters are non-empty strings.
Read the current sessions state from storage.
Find the session to kill by its ID.
IF the session is not found, throw an error.
Kill the tmux process associated with the session.
Remove the session from the sessions array.
Recompute the order field for all remaining sessions.
Write the updated sessions state back to storage.
Return a success result.

methods.name: terminalRenameSession
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, name: string): Promise<RenameSessionResult>

steps.content: Validate that project, session, id, and name parameters meet required criteria.
Read the current sessions state from storage.
Find the session to rename by its ID.
IF the session is not found, throw an error.
Trim whitespace from the new name and default to 'Terminal' if empty.
Update the name field of the session.
Write the updated sessions state back to storage.
Return a success result.

methods.name: terminalReorderSessions
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, orderedIds: string[]): Promise<ReorderSessionsResult>

steps.content: Validate that project, session, and orderedIds parameters meet required criteria.
Read the current sessions state from storage.
Validate that orderedIds contains all session IDs and no extras.
IF validation fails, throw an error.
Reorder the sessions array according to the provided ordered IDs.
Update the order field for each session in the new order.
Write the updated sessions state back to storage.
Return a success result.
